summary: Completed testing of 3 new fixes in Iteration 9. All features verified working: 1) disabled_options in CalculatorConfig API, 2) Product card price fallback when apiModel.basePrice=0, 3) Admin preview panel for balie content. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: BUGFIX #1: disabled_options field in CalculatorConfig - GET /api/settings/calculator returns disabled_options array
BUGFIX #1: GET returns saved disabled_options after PUT
BUGFIX #2: Product 'Kwadratowa 170x200cm' shows price 14,990 PLN in modal (parsed from 'od 14 990 zł')
BUGFIX #2: API model square_170x200 has basePrice=0.0 (confirming bug scenario)
BUGFIX #2: Frontend correctly falls back to parsing product.price string when apiModel.basePrice=0
FEATURE: Admin panel > КУПЕЛИ > Контент tab loads correctly
FEATURE: Preview toggle button (data-testid='preview-toggle-btn') present and clickable
FEATURE: Preview panel (data-testid='balia-preview-panel') appears when button clicked
FEATURE: Preview panel shows hero section with badge, headline, subheadline, CTA buttons
FEATURE: Preview panel shows promo blocks with ON/OFF status badges
Heater selector (data-testid='balie-heater-selector') working in product modal
Compact installment block (data-testid='balie-installment-compact') visible in product modal
critical_code_review_comments: CalculatorConfig Pydantic model correctly includes disabled_options: List[str] = [] field (line ~156 in server.py)
BalieProducts.jsx parseProductPrice function correctly extracts numeric price from strings like 'od 14 990 zł' → 14990
BaliaContentAdmin.jsx preview panel renders with dark theme showing hero section and promo block statuses
Calculator.jsx getFilteredCategories correctly filters out disabled_options from category options
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested 3 fixes: 1) disabled_options field added to CalculatorConfig Pydantic model - API now saves and returns this field correctly, 2) Product card modal price fallback - when apiModel.basePrice=0, frontend parses price from product.price string (e.g., 'od 14 990 zł' → 14990), 3) Admin preview panel in КУПЕЛИ > Контент tab - shows live preview of hero section and promo block ON/OFF statuses. All features working correctly.

disabled_options_api.details: CalculatorConfig model has disabled_options: List[str] = [] field. PUT saves correctly, GET returns saved values. Calculator.jsx filters these options from display.

product_price_fallback.details: Kwadratowa 170x200cm product shows 14,990 PLN in modal despite API returning basePrice=0. parseProductPrice function in BalieProducts.jsx extracts digits from price string.

admin_preview_panel.details: BaliaContentAdmin.jsx has 'Предпросмотр' button (data-testid='preview-toggle-btn') that toggles preview panel (data-testid='balia-preview-panel'). Preview shows hero section with badge, headline, CTA buttons, stats, and promo block ON/OFF statuses.
